text:
KINGS NEUROSCIENCES CENTRE

Clinic Date: 28 December 2024

Dr Kate
Health Centre

Keele University, Keele, Newcastle

Staffordshire ST5 5BG
Dear Dr Kate
Wendy Brown, DOB: 21-11-1982, Hospital No: K482715 NHS No. 6592841037
Flat 7 Brookside Avenue, Newcastle-under-Lyme, ST5 2QD

Summary: Administrative support for housing needs assessment; implanted vagus nerve stimulator in situ; no parameter changes at this review.

I reviewed Wendy Brown in clinic today. The implanted vagus nerve stimulator (VNS) was checked and is functioning as expected. No adjustments to device parameters were required.

Purpose of this letter
- To support a housing needs assessment on health and safety grounds, noting the presence of an implanted VNS device which requires ongoing specialist follow‑up and stable home conditions to facilitate access to routine checks, charging/handheld magnet access, and reliable transport to hospital when needed.

Recommendations for housing assessment
- Ground‑floor or lift‑accessible accommodation to minimise risks associated with frequent clinic attendance and potential urgency of hospital access.
- Consistent mains electricity supply and safe placement of charging/medical equipment (where applicable), with adequate storage for medical documentation and device accessories.
- Proximity to hospital transport links or parking to enable timely attendance for device checks and urgent reviews.
- Bathroom with non‑slip flooring and space for future adaptations if required.

Follow‑up
- Routine neurology follow‑up remains under this service. No immediate device programming changes are planned. Please include this letter in the housing needs file.

Please contact my office if the housing team requires further clinical clarification.

Yours sincerely

check__Seizure Frequency Number.analysis: The letter focuses on a VNS device check and housing needs assessment. It contains no mention of seizures or seizure frequency, and no explicit or implicit statements about how often seizures occur. Therefore, per the instruction to return 'no seizure frequency reference' when seizures are not mentioned at all, that is the appropriate label.
reference: Create a reasonable NHS letter providing administrative support for a housing needs assessment related to epilepsy

flaws.description: No seizure frequency referenced in gold
Row marked as not OK in raw dataset
